# Memory Store

Append-only log schema reference for pipeline decisions, failures, facts, constitution events, and quality scores. In host-project runs, the live file lives at `<ADS_MEMORY_ROOT>/knowledge/memory-store.md`.
Schema: `<AI_DEV_SHOP_ROOT>/framework/memory/memory-schema.md`
Architecture: `<AI_DEV_SHOP_ROOT>/framework/memory/memory-architecture.md`

**Do not edit past entries. Append new entries at the bottom.**
